Fix confirmImport — use $state.snapshot() instead of structuredClone on proxy

human_actions_pending.action: Retest 'Yes, Replace' button after the $state.snapshot() fix
human_actions_pending.context: confirmImport() was using structuredClone on a Svelte 5 reactive proxy — fixed with $state.snapshot(). Need user to verify it now works.

decisions.decision: Use $state.snapshot() instead of structuredClone for importing reactive state
decisions.rationale: importConfirmPending is $state, so .config.chapters is a Svelte 5 reactive proxy. structuredClone on a proxy silently misbehaves. $state.snapshot() returns the plain unproxied value.

next_action: User retests 'Yes, Replace' in browser. If it works, respond 'approved' to the E2E checkpoint so the continuation agent can complete plan 10-02 and trigger phase verification.
context_notes: We are mid-execution of Phase 10 Plan 02 (E2E checkpoint). The continuation agent (agentId a5ea506d478071fe4) is waiting. After user confirms the fix works, spawn a continuation agent for plan 10-02 Task 2, then run the gsd-verifier, then phase complete.
